summary: The diff implements most visual enhancement requirements (REQ-13 through REQ-17) including improved 3D building models, enhanced lighting with shadows, textured terrain with grass, and enhanced troop models. However, several animation and particle effect features are incomplete or missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Resource buildings show particle effects when generating resources
missing_requirements.reason: Particle systems are implemented in ResourceBuilding.tsx but particles are not rendered properly - the points element uses incorrect syntax and particles are static rather than animating to show active resource generation

missing_requirements.requirement: Attack mode shows visual feedback for troop attacks and building damage
missing_requirements.reason: Attack effects infrastructure exists (attackEffects state, triggerAttackEffect function) but no visual rendering of attack impacts or building damage is implemented in AttackMode.tsx or TroopRenderer.tsx
No destruction or damage animations are implemented for buildings when they take damage during attacks

missing_requirements.requirement: Troops have simple walk/attack animations or movement effects
missing_requirements.reason: Only walking bobbing animation is implemented. Attack animations referenced (sword swing) are present but troop attack state is not properly triggered, and no movement along paths is implemented
